privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating the 'customer_tier_history' table with specific columns (history_id, customer_id, old_tier, new_tier, change_date) and establishing a foreign key relationship to the 'customer' table via 'customer_id'. The MySQL Workbench model must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/sakila_loyalty_model.mwb'. All requirements are explicitly stated in the task instructions.
